title: Why is Donald Trump so mean?
subhed: By shamelessly flouting democratic norms and flaunting his amorality, brutality and bad faith, the American president restores pride to his humiliated electoral base, unsettles his opponents, and subverts the rules of the political game.

Key facts to understand cadmium, an emerging public health issue
subhed: Cadmium, a heavy metal toxic to human health, is found in many everyday foods. Children and women are most affected by this carcinogenic contaminant, which is the subject of growing concern.

title: Sociologist Dominique Méda on the 'lessons of Lionel Jospin and Jürgen Habermas'
subhed: As the race for the 2027 French presidential election gets underway, the former prime minister, a champion of solemnity in politics, and the German philosopher, a leading thinker on democratic Europe, should serve as sources of inspiration, writes the researcher in her column.

title: Sex is an art form hidden in the shadows
subhed: Moral panic over the pleasures of the flesh prevents us from recognizing the artistic dimension of sexuality, as well as from passing down the best practices, argues Le Monde columnist  Maïa Mazaurette.

title: Will Self: 'Our historical condition is a peculiar mixture of omniscience and impotence'
subhed: We are bombarded by a swarm of signals too numerous to interpret in time, and the world appears both predetermined and uncontrollable, observes the British writer in an op-ed for Le Monde.

Le Duc brings the fresh taste of the sea to Paris
subhed: For nearly 60 years, Le Duc, a family-run Parisian institution known for its delicate fish recipes, has drawn a loyal following who come to savor impossibly thinly sliced, pearly raw sea bass or langoustines with red shiso and wasabi.

title: How 'The Camp of the Saints' became the far right's cult novel, from the Le Pens to MAGA
subhed: Since its publication in 1973, Jean Raspail's novel has shaped the imagination of ideologues who oppose immigration. The openly racist story, which envisions a million Indians descending on the French coast, was recently republished across the Atlantic.

title: Russian 'ghost fleet' tanker drifts alarmingly in the Mediterranean
subhed: The Arctic-Metagaz, a sanctioned vessel carrying liquefied natural gas, has been drifting dangerously since Libyan authorities failed to tow it to safety.
